title: Ysanna (individual)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Ysanna.png]] |name=Ysanna |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Missing Soldier|Tansarii Point Station}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=Brown |feathers= |eyes=Blue |skin=Tan |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Ysanna needs help finding someone in Station Gamma. I'll provide it.''"
"''Excellent. She's been distressed.|A spacer and [[Inaldra/Legends|Inaldra's]] [[Inaldra's Lieutenant|Lieutenant]]|{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Speak to Inaldra's Lieutenant to Get Work|Tansarii Point Station}}}} '''Ysanna''' was a [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|My husband was sent to Station Gamma and hasn't returned yet. I fear for his safety. His unit recently engaged in some fighting with the Rak'qua.|Ysanna|}} Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Ysanna resided with her husband onboard [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located above [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]]. Her husband was a [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] in the small military fore defending the station. In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],{{SWG_timeline}} a war erupted between Tansarii Point Station and the [[Rak'qua]], an aggressive tribe of [[Nautolan/Legends|Nautolans]] living on [[Station Gamma]], another space station in the Bright Jewel system. At some point, Ysanna's husband and his unit were dispatched to investigate disappearances on Station Gamma. After the soldiers engaged the Rak'qua, communications were lost and the unit never returned to Tansarii Point Station. Fearing for the safety of her husband, Ysanna contracted a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to travel to Station Gamma and bring back proof of what happened. Ysanna's fears proved to be correct; the spacer discovered that Ysanna's husband had gone mad from the violent fightings in that place. After [[Death/Legends|killing]] the now-crazed soldier, the spacer presented the soldier's [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]] to Ysanna as proof of what had happened. Though grief-stricken at the loss of her husband, she paid the spacer 1,500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. ==Behind the scenes== Ysanna appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}} Ysanna was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]]," introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}} ==Appearances== *{{GalaxiesNGE}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{SWGWiki|Missing Soldier}} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Tansarii Point Station residents]]
